description: Error Status Lifecycle - State Machine Definition

OPEN.description: New error can be suppressed, resolved, or escalated

SUPPRESSED.description: Suppressed error can be resolved or reopened

RESOLVED.description: Resolved error can be archived or reopened

ESCALATED.description: Escalated error can be resolved or marked pending

PENDING.description: Pending error can be resolved or reopened

REOPEN.description: Reopened error returns to OPEN-like transitions

ARCHIVED.description: Archived error can only be reopened

SUPPRESSED.label: Suppressed
SUPPRESSED.description: Error acknowledged as 'wrong but acceptable' with justification

RESOLVED.label: Resolved
RESOLVED.description: Error fixed or remediated through auto or manual action

ARCHIVED.label: Archived
ARCHIVED.description: Closed error kept for audit trail

ESCALATED.label: Escalated
ESCALATED.description: Critical error requiring manual intervention or expert review

PENDING.label: Pending
PENDING.description: Waiting for external action (e.g., user input, external system)

REOPEN.label: Reopened
REOPEN.description: Previously resolved/suppressed error reoccurred or was questioned

suppression_workflow.description: Known issue workflow: detect → justify/approve → archive

escalation_workflow.description: Critical issue workflow: detect → escalate → expert fix → archive

reopen_workflow.description: Reopen workflow: archived → reoccurred → re-fix → re-archive

on_escalate.message: Critical error escalated - immediate attention required
